extraction.one_line_summary: KWIATKOWSKI won stage 3 team time trial, Team Sky dominated with 37-second margin over BMC, reclaiming yellow jersey.
tactical_patterns: Sky placed three riders in prologue top nine, pre-positioning strength for TTT dominance—check prologue results before handicapping TTTs.
BARDET's AG2R started with only six riders after abandonment, confirming TTT disadvantage compounds quickly with depleted squads.
Sky beat second-placed BMC by 37 seconds at finish but only 22 at intermediate two—accelerated final segment critical.

rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: positive: reclaimed yellow after losing it Wednesday, Sky's TTT tactical leader
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: fourth overall at 1:52, Sky's protected GC rider positioned conservatively in TTT
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: seventh at 1:29 with depleted six-man squad after VUILLERMOZ abandon, GC ambitions compromised early
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: lost two minutes in TTT with Bahrain, catastrophic GC setback on flat terrain
rider_signals.MOSCON Gianni: positive: Sky top three overall after TTT, confirms prologue strength translated to team effort
rider_signals.CASTROVIEJO Jonathan: positive: Sky top three overall after TTT, workhorse executed perfectly
